title: Croatian Potato Crumble
description: A gluten-free take on a classic dish, combining the flavors of Croatia with the comfort of a warm crumble.
instructions: Cook the Croatian sausage in a large skillet over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks, until browned and cooked through.
Add the diced i to the skillet and cook until they start to soften.
Add the diced potatoes to the skillet and cook until they are slightly tender.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the crumble and a pinch of salt.
Top the potato mixture with the crumble mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the crumble is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
